stemHtml:
The pilot of an aircraft is planning a flight carrying a bridal pair, both sitting on the rear seats. The calculated CG is out of limits and the pilot decides to load some ballast at the front seats to move the CG within limits. The aircraft total mass is 2570 lb. Given the following data, how much should the weight of the ballast be?

Datum: at the nose
Front seats: 65 in
Rear seats: 105 in
Compartment: 145 in
Aft limit: 149 in aft
Actual CG: 160 in aft
